title: DOS proposes revisions to Form DS-234, Special Immigrant Visa Biodata
description_html:
DOS announces proposed revisions to Form DS-234, Special Immigrant Visa Biodata Form and provides a 60-day comment period ending on July 29, 2025. Form DS–234 elicits information used to determine the eligibility of certain Iraqis and Afghan SIV recipients for refugee resettlement benefits.

[Trump 2.0 ID #]
